info.title: Coql
info.description: COQL APIs to fetch records data based on queries

post.description: Executes a COQL select query to fetch records data.

schema.description: Request Body to get records data using COQL

select_query.description: COQL select query to fetch records data

include_meta.description: List of metadata to include in the response. Currently only supports 'fields' to get field metadata for select columns.

schema.description: Response containing matching records and pagination info

data.description: Root key containing list of records

more_records.description: Indicates if there are more records available

fields.description: Field metadata for the select columns. Keys are field API names and values are field metadata objects.

204.description: Success response when there are no matching records

400.description: Error response due to invalid query

oneOf.title: SyntaxError
oneOf.description: Syntax error response
Empty details for syntax error
Details about the syntax error clause

clause.description: The clause where the syntax error occurred

oneOf.description: Details about the syntax error location

line.description: Line number where the error occurred

column.description: Column number where the error occurred

oneOf.description: Details about unsupported operator in syntax error
Details about syntax error with near text only

oneOf.title: LimitExceeded
oneOf.description: Limit exceeded error response

details.description: Additional details about the limit exceeded error

oneOf.title: InvalidQuery
oneOf.description: Invalid query error response
Invalid Column Details

column_name.description: The field API Name with invalid data

oneOf.description: Invalid Column LimitDetails

limit.description: The maximum allowed limit for the column if applicable

oneOf.description: Invalid Column Clause Details

column_name.description: The field API Name with invalid data

clause.description: The clause associated with the invalid column

oneOf.description: Invalid Module Details

module.description: The field API Name with invalid data

oneOf.description: Invalid CV ID Details

cvid.description: The field API Name with invalid data

oneOf.description: Invalid Operator Details

column_name.description: Name of the column involved in the invalid query

operator.description: Invalid operator used in the query

oneOf.description: Invalid Alias Details

column_name.description: The field API Name with invalid alias

oneOf.description: Empty details for invalid query
Invalid query details with criteria information

cv_criteria.description: Indicates if custom view criteria is involved

column_name.description: The field API Name with invalid criteria

value.description: The value used in the invalid criteria

operator.description: The operator used in the invalid criteria

oneOf.description: Invalid query details for subquery returning incompatible values

sub_query_sequence.description: The sequence number of the subquery

operator.description: The operator incompatible with multiple subquery values

oneOf.description: Invalid query details for subquery with multiple columns

sub_query_sequence.description: The sequence number of the subquery

column_name.description: The columns specified in the subquery

oneOf.title: InvalidAlias
oneOf.description: Invalid alias error response

details.description: Additional details about the invalid alias error

column_name.description: The field API Name with invalid alias

oneOf.title: DuplicateData
oneOf.description: Duplicate data error response
Duplicate data details with column name

column_name.description: The field API Name of the duplicate select column

oneOf.description: Duplicate data details with aggregate function

column_name.description: The field API Name of the duplicate column

oneOf.title: DuplicateAlias
oneOf.description: Duplicate alias error response

details.description: Additional details about the duplicate alias error

alias.description: The duplicate alias used in the query

referred_columns.description: List of columns that referred to the duplicate alias

items.description: The field API name used in the select clause referring to the duplicate alias

oneOf.title: MandatoryNotFound
oneOf.description: Mandatory field not found error response

code.description: Error code indicating mandatory field not found

details.description: Details about the missing mandatory field

api_name.description: API name of the missing mandatory field

oneOf.title: InvalidData
oneOf.description: Invalid data error response
Invalid data details with expected data type

expected_data_type.description: The expected data type for the field

api_name.description: API name of the field with invalid data

json_path.description: JSON path to the invalid field

oneOf.description: Invalid data details with supported values

api_name.description: API name of the field with invalid data

json_path.description: JSON path to the invalid field

supported_values.description: List of supported values for the field

oneOf.description: Invalid data details for unsupported aggregate function
Invalid data details with expected data type and supported values

expected_data_type.description: The expected data type for the field

api_name.description: API name of the field with invalid data

json_path.description: JSON path to the invalid field

supported_values.description: List of supported values for the field

oneOf.description: Empty details for invalid data error

oneOf.title: InvalidModule
oneOf.description: Invalid module error response

details.description: Empty details for invalid module error

CoqlFieldSchema.description: Schema representing a field in the module.

oneOf.description: Gives detail related to the associated module LIKE subform

webhook.description: Wether webhook is enabled for the field

operation_type.description: Operation types allowed for the field

web_update.description: Wether any operation is allowed through web update

api_create.description: Wether any operation is allowed through API create

web_create.description: Wether any operation is allowed through web create

api_update.description: Wether any operation is allowed through API update

colour_code_enabled_by_system.description: Wether any colour code is enabled by system

oneOf.description: if tool tip is enabled then it will return the information

name.description: it gives the name of the tool tip

oneOf.description: if display format properties is available then it will return the information

split.description: for phone it will return the split value

radio_display_type.description: for radiobutton it will return the display type

type.description: Type of the field used or unused.

oneOf.description: Customizable properties of the field

items.description: A customizable property of the field

oneOf.description: if association details is available then it will return the information
if multi module lookup is available then it will return the information

modules.description: List of modules associated with the multi module lookup

show.description: Indicates if the external field is shown

type.description: Indicates the type of the external field

case_sensitive.description: Indicates if the uniqueness is case sensitive

enable_colour_code.description: Indicates if colour code is enabled for the field

if range is available then it will return the information
